channel.title: Polygon Digital
channel.description: Market analysis with conviction. We tell you what we think is happening and why it matters.

item.title: The token paradox: AI's economy is exploding, deflating, and barely profitable
item.description: Token volumes are up hundreds of times over, the price of intelligence is collapsing ~10x a year, growth is already decelerating — and almost no one selling tokens is making money. Here is who actually wins.
